name: Consumer Credit and Budget Counseling
description_short: Non-profit credit counseling organization in Marmora, NJ offering free financial assistance and budget guidance to consumers seeking debt management support.
description_long:
Consumer Credit and Budget Counseling is a credit counseling service based in Marmora, New Jersey, operating from 299 S Shore Rd. The organization is positioned as a free-help provider in the consumer finance space, aligning with non-profit credit counseling standards. While the website content available is limited to a Chamber of Commerce business listing, the company maintains regular business hours and active client engagement.

The organization provides credit counseling and budget counseling services to consumers. Based on client reviews, staff members conduct thorough financial assessments and work with clients through structured counseling processes. The company employs counselors including at least one named Amber/Amberlynn who are noted for their follow-up communication and dedication to client outcomes.

The business distinguishes itself through personalized service and consistent client contact. Multiple reviews specifically praise staff members for being thorough in the process and maintaining contact throughout the entire counseling engagement, suggesting a relationship-based approach rather than transactional service delivery. The company responds professionally to online reviews and acknowledges staff performance.

Key limitations exist in assessing this company: the Chamber of Commerce listing provides minimal detail about specific services, certifications, service area reach, or fee structure. No independent website content was accessible to verify NFCC certification, HUD approval status, or detailed service offerings. The 4-review sample size is statistically small. Prospective clients should contact the organization directly to confirm qualifications, accreditation, and service scope before committing.
pros: 4.8-star rating from verified client reviews on Chamber of Commerce
Staff credited for thoroughness in financial assessment and counseling process
Counselors maintain consistent contact with clients throughout entire engagement
Professional business response to customer feedback and reviews
Consistent weekday operating hours (9 AM - 5 PM Monday-Friday)
Personalized service approach with named counselors assigned to clients
Located in South Jersey with physical office address for in-person consultations
cons: Limited online presence — no independent website content available to verify services or credentials
No visible information about NFCC certification, HUD approval, or non-profit status confirmation
Very small review sample size (only 4 reviews) limits reliability of ratings
Closed weekends with no evening hours for working clients
No published fee structure or service pricing information accessible online
best_for: South Jersey residents seeking local in-person credit counseling
Consumers needing personalized budget guidance and debt counseling
Individuals preferring assigned counselor relationships with ongoing contact
diagnosis: Consumer Credit and Budget Counseling appears suited for South Jersey residents seeking free or low-cost credit and budget counseling with personalized service. The primary caveat is the extremely limited publicly available information about the organization's credentials, certifications, accreditations, and specific service offerings — prospective clients must contact directly to verify non-profit status, NFCC membership, and detailed scope before engagement.
